sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34242" key="e)/mpasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμ-πασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n34242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dusting-powder</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:31:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.31.1</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.6.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
